<?php echo '<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>' ?> <sitemapindex xmlns="http://www.sitemaps.org/schemas/sitemap/0.9"> <?php foreach ($__sitemaps as $__sitemap): ?> <sitemap> <loc><?php echo htmlspecialchars($__sitemap->getLocation(), ENT_XML1) ?></loc> <?php if ($__sitemap->getLastModified()): ?> <lastmod><?php echo $__sitemap->getLastModified()->format('Y-m-d\TH:i:sP') ?></lastmod> <?php endif ?> </sitemap> <?php endforeach ?> </sitemapindex>
